name: Pablo's Cars
appointmentNote: Reviews and background checked on Facebook before we meet.
bio: Name's Pablo — I buy, clean up, and resell salvage and rebuilt-title vehicles around Asheville. No holds, no financing, no trades: first serious buyer with cash takes it home. Happy to meet for a test drive. Se habla español.
policyNote: No holds — first serious buyer takes it. Cash only, no trades, no financing.
